title: Verify experiment cohort targeting logic
description: Test that the Trial Corner feature is only shown to users who do not consume content within the first 5 minutes of their trial.
preconditions: Create two new trial users, User A and User B.

steps.description: 1. For User A, start playing any content within 2 minutes of activating the trial.
2. For User B, activate the trial and do not play any content for 6 minutes.
3. Check the homepage for both users.
4. Navigate to the 'Manage Subscription' section for both users.

expected_result: User A (consumed content) should NOT see the Trial Corner widget or flow. User B (no consumption) SHOULD see the Trial Corner widget and have the new flow in 'Manage Subscription'.
